creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->freebsd-ports-bugs

This extra output is a new feature introduced in r199803 and merged to 8.x 
shortly after 8.0 was released.  although this may be a POLA violation,  
as this is the only problem reported, I think this is probably best fixed by 
the port maintainer.
